# RentWorksPlus
> Cloud-based car rental management platform by Bluebird Auto Rental Systems

RentWorksPlus is a multi-tenant, cloud-based car rental management platform with 26 integrated modules. It covers the full rental lifecycle from reservations through check-out, including fleet management, payment processing, claims management, and customer relationship management. Designed for car rental agencies, dealerships with rental departments, and fleet operators, it consolidates daily operations into a single platform with role-based access control and multi-location support.

## Core Capabilities
- Reservations: Full reservation lifecycle with conflict detection, availability tracking, and open reservation management
- Fleet Management: ACRISS vehicle classification, service history, financial tracking, equipment assignment, and real-time availability
- Payment Processing: Adyen gateway integration with hosted payments and direct billing
- Vehicle Inspection: Photo-based digital inspection covering 60+ vehicle zones with damage classification and customer self-service
- Claims Management: End-to-end claims with nine detail tabs, multi-vehicle tracking, expense reconciliation, and repair orders
- Form Builder: Visual drag-and-drop document builder with conditional logic, e-signature fields, and custom templates
- Analytics Dashboard: 15+ real-time KPIs for fleet status, revenue trends, utilization, conversion rates, and maintenance alerts
- Customer Profiles: 360-degree customer management with OCR license scanning, rental history, payment tracking, and duplicate detection
- Loyalty Programs: Configurable tiers, points, and rewards to encourage repeat business
- Contracts: Digital contract management with search, print, and email capabilities
- Check-In/Check-Out: Structured workflows with vehicle inspection and payment processing at each stage

## Key Facts
- 26 integrated feature modules
- Multi-tenant architecture with role-based access control
- Payment gateway: Adyen
- 60+ vehicle inspection zones with photo documentation
- 15+ dashboard KPIs for real-time analytics
- Multi-location enterprise configuration with 20+ configurable areas
- Built-in interactive training and onboarding system
- Customer self-service inspection portal
- OCR license scanning for fast customer onboarding
- ACRISS industry-standard vehicle classification

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is RentWorksPlus?
RentWorksPlus is a cloud-based car rental management platform built by Bluebird Auto Rental Systems. It provides 26 integrated modules covering the full rental lifecycle from reservations and check-in through vehicle inspection, payment processing, and check-out.

### What payment gateways does RentWorksPlus support?
RentWorksPlus integrates with Adyen for payment processing, plus hosted payment solutions and direct billing. The system supports real-time payment status tracking and error recovery.

### How does vehicle inspection work?
The inspection system uses photo-based documentation across 60+ mapped vehicle zones. Staff mark damage on visual vehicle diagrams, classify damage types, and attach photos. A customer self-service option is also available.

### Can it manage multiple locations?
Yes. Each location can have its own configuration for vehicle categories, fuel pricing, rate rules, seasonal pricing, counter positions, and staff roles. Vehicle inventory tracking supports inter-branch transport coordination.
